purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `coach` (turn L4 Ship-gate feedback into team-shared knowledge-base rules)? Negatives are other harness steps and an out-of-harness control.

cases.query: coach this feedback into the knowledge base
record this lesson for next sprint
RLHF the harness with this retro feedback
update the knowledge base with what we learned this run
implement the next task on the board
run the harness from pitch to ship
summarize this PDF report for me
